name: Stanmore Resources Limited
analysis: Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$2.5752. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$2.5752, stop A$2.3463, target A$2.6400. Risk/reward is 0.28:1.
